rules.selector: /* Phase 34B: rebuilt component system. This file contains global, reusable UI components only. Module-specific exceptions belong in css/modules.css. */ /* Surfaces / typography -------------------------------------------------- */ .glass-surface, .card, .tc-card

rules.body: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)); gap: var(--tc-gap);
color: var(--color-text); font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.2; text-align: left; white-space: normal;
color: var(--color-muted); font-size: 10px; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: 1.1px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 900;
color: var(--color-text); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.2; font-weight: 900; white-space: normal;
display: grid; gap: 4px; padding: var(--tc-gap) 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.10);
color: var(--color-muted); font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.4px; font-weight: 900;
color: var(--color-text); font-size: clamp(24px,3vw,36px); line-height: 1.05; font-weight: 900; text-align: left;

rules.selector: /* Phase 35A: RC retest UI contract hardening. Keep spacing, menu sizing and result rows globally consistent after 34D rebuild. */ .module-content, .module-content > *, .tc-stack, .card, .tc-card, .card__body, .tc-card__body, .result-card__body, .result-list, .result-groups, .inline-stats, .line-section-list, .saved-record-list, [data-platform-dynamic], [data-pipe-dynamic], [data-ph-dynamic], [data-buffer-dynamic], [data-hx-dynamic], [data-dw-dynamic]
/* Wastewater: direct dynamic wrappers inside module columns need the same rhythm as cards. */ .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .span-6 > [data-ww-dynamic]
/* Do not stack vertical margins inside card bodies; spacing is gap-owned. */ .card__body > *, .tc-card__body > *, .result-card__body > *, .tc-stack > *
/* Phase 36S.1: result-row spacing is owned by .result-list gap */ .result-list > .result-row, .tc-result-list > .result-row
/* Renderer layout: module-content owns the 12-column grid; all direct module blocks use the central 8px gap. */ .module-content
/* Mobile width lock and clipping guards. */ .app-main, .grid-12, .module-view, .tc-grid, .module-content, .two-column, .tc-two-column, .card-grid, .form-grid, .tc-fields
/* Phase 36Q.4: renderer module columns use the same gap variable as cards. */ .module-content, .module-view, .tc-grid
/* Phase 36Q.4: wastewater follows global spacing only. */ .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .card, .module-view[data-module='wastewater'] .result-card

/* Hard viewport width lock: prevents mobile layouts and wide content from pushing the page sideways. */ body, .app-shell, .app-header, .module-nav, .app-main, .module-content, .card, .control, .formula

${rows.map(r => `
${esc(r.label)}${esc(r.value ?? '—')}${r.unit ? ` ${esc(r.unit)}` : ''}
`).join('')}
`; } export function formCard(title, fields, accent = 'blue', cols = 2) { return card(title, grid(fields.join(''), cols), accent); } export function resultCard(title, rows, accent = 'blue') { return card(title, resultRows(rows), accent); } export function emptyCard(title, message, accent = 'blue') { return card(title, `
${message}
`, accent); } export function isMobileViewport() { return Boolean( window.matchMedia?.('(max-width: 768px)').matches || window.visualViewport && Math.abs(window.innerHeight - window.visualViewport.height) > 80 ); } export function snapshotViewport(options = {}) { const doc = document.scrollingElement || document.documentElement; const anchor = options.anchor || findViewportAnchor(options.event?.target) || findViewportAnchor(document.activeElement); const anchorInfo = getAnchorSnapshot(anchor); return { x: window.scrollX || doc.scrollLeft || 0, y: window.scrollY || doc.scrollTop || 0, anchor: anchorInfo }; } export function restoreViewport(snapshot) { if (!snapshot) return; if (snapshot.anchor?.selector) { const anchor = document.querySelector(snapshot.anchor.selector); if (anchor) { const currentTop = anchor.getBoundingClientRect().top; const delta = currentTop - snapshot.anchor.top; if (Math.abs(delta) > 1) { window.scrollTo(snapshot.x || 0, M
